ctxMarket: Attention is focused on Solana’s positioning as a potential new risk-on leader among altcoins, with notable SOL/BTC strength. Broader market flows show profit-taking in Solana, Ether, and Bitcoin as traders await clarity on a U.S.-Iran deal.
ctxTalking:
• Solana treasury firms resisting acquisition attempts by Forward Industries
• Solana’s role as presenting sponsor for the 2026 World Series of Poker, enabling crypto tournament entries
• XRP surpassing Solana and Ethereum in 90-day real-world asset inflows
ctxMatters: Solana’s treasury sector is seeing consolidation attempts, but resistance from firms signals ongoing competition. The World Series of Poker partnership highlights Solana’s push into mainstream events and payment use cases. Shifts in real-world asset flows and altcoin leadership could influence future network activity and builder sentiment.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Treasury firm consolidation efforts and Solana’s growing mainstream integrations.
Noise: Short-term profit-taking tied to geopolitical headlines.
ctxGlossary:
RWA — Real-world assets, such as tokenized stocks or real estate, represented on blockchains
DAT — Digital Asset Treasury, firms managing on-chain treasuries for protocols or DAOs

readMore.title: XRP just beat Ethereum, Solana and others in 90-Day RWA flows as traders pile back into the token
Solana treasury firms resist Forward Industries’ consolidation push
